title: thelymitra campanulata
intro: Thelymitra campanulata, also known as the bell orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia, characterized by its unique bell-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Thelymitra campanulata lie in its roots, which are used in traditional Aboriginal medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the roots of Thelymitra campanulata are often used to make teas or infusions, which are said to have medicinal properties when consumed.
